docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.06 FILED BY JANJUA, LIAQUAT ALI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JANJUA, LIAQUAT ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT $1,200.06 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT
